seo.metaTitle: Project Management for Service Provider Deployments | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Dedicated project managers for deployments, large-scale migrations, and custom implementations. Hostopia's PM team delivers on time, on scope, on your behalf.

hero.headline: Every Project. One Point of Contact.
hero.subheadline: A dedicated project manager for every deployment, migration, and custom implementation — on time, on scope, and on budget.

howItWorks.heading: A Dedicated PM from Day One
howItWorks.intro: Every Hostopia project gets a dedicated project manager who serves as the single point of contact between your organization and our delivery teams.

cards.title: New Deployments
cards.body: Your PM builds the project plan, coordinates resources, manages timelines, and ensures every milestone is met — from platform configuration through go-live.

cards.title: Large-Scale Migrations
cards.body: Over 400 successful migrations and millions of email accounts moved for major telecom providers worldwide. Your PM oversees the process using Hostopia's proprietary SNAP migration platform — eliminating downtime and minimizing customer disruption.

cards.title: Custom Implementations
cards.body: Billing integration, custom development, or specialized configuration — your PM scopes the work, coordinates delivery, and manages through UAT and deployment.

cards.title: Flexible Engagement
cards.body: We work on your behalf end-to-end, or alongside your own PM, integrating into your processes and reporting structures.

migrationExpertise.heading: 400+ Migrations. Millions of Accounts. Minimal Disruption.

items.title: SNAP Migration Platform
items.body: Proprietary tooling that automates sync, eliminates downtime, and ensures continuous mail delivery.

items.title: Legacy Platform Experience
items.body: Proven success with Zimbra, Synacor, and other legacy systems.

items.title: PIM Data Transfer
items.body: Contacts, calendars, and personal data migrated alongside email.

items.title: DNS Independence
items.body: No dependency on DNS changes, reducing risk and complexity.

items.title: Real-Time Monitoring
items.body: Constant reporting and proactive communication throughout every phase.

items.title: Named PM
items.body: Accountable for delivery from kickoff to handoff.

items.title: Weekly Status Reporting
items.body: Risk registers, escalation paths, and progress updates.

items.title: Cross-Functional Coordination
items.body: Engineering, support, and operations pulled in as needed.

items.title: Clean Post-Launch Handoff
items.body: Structured transition to Service Management and Support.

cta.headline: Let's Scope Your Project
cta.body: Hostopia's PM team has the methodology and the track record. Let's talk about your timeline.
